reasoning: The control IA-5(4) focuses on password strength determination, which is specific to identity and access management systems that manage user credentials, such as those provided by cloud providers (e.g., AWS IAM, Azure AD). Kubernetes itself does not manage user passwords directly, as it relies on external identity providers for authentication. Therefore, there is no direct equivalent control in Kubernetes for enforcing password strength policies.
title: Authenticator Management - Authenticator management | automated support for password strength determination
